description: Composition Woven maroon kurta made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves with embroidered panel on the cuffs, mandarin collar with an extended chest placket that has embroidered panel on the sides, and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This piece of art by aurelia is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and flats for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtis Height-5'7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
